name: Coca Cola Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and sugar.
2. Heat butter, cocoa, and cola until boiling, then pour over flour and sugar.
3. In a separate bowl, mix buttermilk, eggs, baking soda, vanilla, and marshmallows.
4. Add the mixture from step 3 to the flour mixture and combine well. The batter will be thin.
5. Bake in a 13 x 9-inch pan at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
6. While the cake is hot, prepare the icing by heating butter, cocoa, and cola until boiling.
7. Pour the boiling mixture over powdered sugar and whisk well.
8. Add nuts to the icing and spread on the hot cake.
